title: Convenient Achievements
description: Convenient Achievements - adds a lot of interesting achievements to the game, for which you may even have to explore the whole world.
body:
![Achievements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03bf9c48f4983a543b8a4f50b21841aea3191c30.png)

### Convenient achievements adds new achievements and 1 crafting to the game!

-------------------------------------------------------------

Datapack adds a new tab to the game in the achievements section called - Convenient achievements. New achievements and 1 new crafting. _(Crafting adds the ability to craft a block of light from 5 glass, 1 lightstone and 1 hook.)_

When you have a gold bar in your inventory you will unlock a new achievements tab called: Convenient Achievements.

If you don't know English, you can install a [resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/translate-convenient-achievements) that translates all achievements into different languages of the world.

This datapack is just a simple addition to vanilla minecraft and adds a small number of achievements for a more diverse interest in passing the game.

ㅤ[![GitHub](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/155cd079770499dc382d7573f100bc4c35e424e5.png)](https://github.com/SayNooty/Convenient-achivements)ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ     ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ[![My Projects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47ab0898f1f1441cd3dfadcf84fed1455d9a9847.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/SayNooty)

#
### **Starting from version 1.21, there is support for Fabric, Quilt and NeoForge mods!**   
Necessary mods for Convenient achievements to work:
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)

The mod has built-in translation into different languages! You don't have to install the resource pack.
